subcodes.first_line: O ye who stand firm in the Covenant! In these days of disorder and revolution, throughout all of Persia, the banner hath been raised in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان در این ایام اختلال و انقلاب در جمیع ایران علم افراخته در
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @unity; oneness of humanity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @past, present and future of Iran, @growth of the Cause, @non-participation in politics
